name: Golf Links Simulators
address: 9805 Sandy Rock Pl Suite G, Charlotte, NC 28277
about: Golf Links Simulators (GLS) is a golf simulator facility located in Rea Farms, Charlotte. It uses HD Golf™ technology for precision and data to help players improve their swings, with access to expert coaches. The venue offers a family-friendly environment and extends beyond golf to include a suite of virtual sports. Standard rates for 30-minute sessions are based on off-peak and peak hour pricing. GLS is inspired by the former Charlotte Golf Links and aims to continue the tradition of golf as a community pastime.
why_golfers_like_it: HD Golf™ technology provides pinpoint accuracy for skill development
Access to a wide variety of world-renowned golf courses
Expert coaching available to guide your golf journey
Family-friendly environment built for all skill levels
Flexible off-peak and peak hour pricing options

food_and_drink.notes: Pro shop with premium brands and products available.
BYOB allowed, as confirmed by sources.

simulator_hardware.notes: Exclusively used for their pinpoint accuracy and advanced technology.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent them from our pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food. Alcohol is also allowed (BYOB).

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard 18-hole round typically takes about 1.5 to 2 hours, depending on the pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golf Links Simulators is designed by a golfer and built for families, making it a kid-friendly environment.
